name: Street end
description:
Great walls have been constructed at this place to keep back the powerful
forces of the sea.  Upon the city side, the wall is fairly low so that you can
look over it.  Upon the other side, far below, is the beach.  Handholds in the
rock could allow you to scale the wall.  There is even a steep ramp upon the
other side.  Otherwise you are at an intersection and can travel north or
northeast or you could enter the lighthouse to the south.
